meta.title: Third Conditional & Mixed Conditionals
meta.description: Master the third conditional and mixed conditional sentences for hypothetical past and present situations.
meta.description_ko: 가정적 과거 및 현재 상황을 위한 3형 조건문과 혼합 조건문을 학습합니다.

explanation.en: Third conditional: 'If + past perfect, would have + past participle'. Used for hypothetical past situations.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문: 'If + 과거완료, would have + 과거분사'. 가정적 과거 상황에 씁니다.

questions.prompt: 3형 조건문(third conditional)의 구조는?
choices: If + past simple, would + base verb
If + present simple, will + base verb
If + past perfect, would have + past participle
If + past perfect, would + base verb

explanation.en: Third conditional 'if' clause: 'had + past participle' (past perfect).
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문 'if' 절: 'had + 과거분사'(과거완료).

questions.prompt: If she _____ harder, she would have passed the exam. (더 열심히 공부했더라면 시험에 합격했을 텐데.)

explanation.en: Third conditional expresses hypothetical situations about the past — what didn't happen but could have.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문은 과거에 대한 가정적 상황을 표현합니다 — 일어나지 않았지만 일어날 수도 있었던 일.

questions.prompt: 3형 조건문이 나타내는 상황은?
choices: 과거에 일어나지 않은 일에 대한 가정

explanation.en: Third conditional: 'If I had known' + 'I would have called you'.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문: 'If I had known' + 'I would have called you'.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: If I had known, I would have called you.

explanation.en: Result clause: 'would have + past participle' = 'would have missed'.
explanation.ko: 결과절: 'would have + 과거분사' = 'would have missed'.

questions.prompt: We _____ the last train if we hadn't left so early. (그렇게 일찍 떠나지 않았더라면 막차를 놓쳤을 것입니다.)

explanation.en: Never use 'would have' in the 'if' clause. Use past perfect: 'had studied'.
explanation.ko: 'if' 절에 'would have'를 쓰지 않습니다. 과거완료를 씁니다: 'had studied'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'If he would have studied, he would have passed.'

explanation.en: Mixed conditional = past hypothetical condition + present result (or vice versa).
explanation.ko: 혼합 조건문 = 과거 가정 조건 + 현재 결과(또는 그 반대).

questions.prompt: 혼합 조건문(mixed conditional)이란?
choices: 과거의 가정이 현재 결과에 영향을 미치는 조건문

explanation.en: Mixed conditional: 'If + past perfect' (past condition) + 'would + base verb' (present result).
explanation.ko: 혼합 조건문: 'If + 과거완료'(과거 조건) + 'would + 동사 원형'(현재 결과).

questions.prompt: If she had taken the job in Paris, she _____ there now. (파리에서 그 일을 받아들였더라면 지금 거기 있을 텐데.)

explanation.en: Mixed: 'weren't so shy' = present condition; 'would have spoken' = past result.
explanation.ko: 혼합: 'weren't so shy' = 현재 조건; 'would have spoken' = 과거 결과.

questions.prompt: 'If I weren't so shy, I would have spoken to her at the party.' — 이 문장의 유형은?

explanation.en: Mixed conditional: present ability condition + past result.
explanation.ko: 혼합 조건문: 현재 능력 조건 + 과거 결과.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: If she could speak Chinese, she would have got the job.

explanation.en: Mixed: past condition ('hadn't stayed up') + present result ('wouldn't be tired').
explanation.ko: 혼합: 과거 조건('hadn't stayed up') + 현재 결과('wouldn't be tired').

questions.prompt: I _____ so tired now if I hadn't stayed up all night. (밤을 새우지 않았더라면 지금 이렇게 피곤하지 않을 텐데.)

explanation.en: 'But for + noun' = 'If it hadn't been for + noun' — hypothetical past.
explanation.ko: 'but for + 명사' = 'if it hadn't been for + 명사' — 과거 가정.

questions.prompt: 'But for your help, I would never have finished the project.' — 'But for'의 의미는?

explanation.en: Inverted third conditional: 'Had she + past participle' = 'If she had ...'
explanation.ko: 도치된 3형 조건문: 'Had she + 과거분사' = 'If she had ...'

questions.prompt: Had she arrived on time, she _____ the meeting. (제시간에 도착했더라면 회의에 참석할 수 있었을 텐데.)

explanation.en: Result clause can use: 'would have', 'could have', 'might have' depending on the meaning.
explanation.ko: 결과절에는 의미에 따라 'would have', 'could have', 'might have'가 올 수 있습니다.

questions.prompt: 3형 조건문에서 결과절에 올 수 있는 모달은?
choices: would have / could have / might have

explanation.en: Third conditional 'if' clause always uses past perfect: 'had been'.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문 'if' 절에는 항상 과거완료: 'had been'.

questions.prompt: If the weather _____ better yesterday, we could have gone hiking. (어제 날씨가 더 좋았더라면 등산을 갈 수 있었을 텐데.)

explanation.en: Past perfect requires past participle: 'had listened', not 'had listen'.
explanation.ko: 과거완료는 과거분사를 요구합니다: 'had listened'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'If they had listen to me, this wouldn't have happened.'

explanation.en: Inverted third conditional with 'Had I known'. Formal alternative to 'If I had known'.
explanation.ko: 'Had I known'으로 도치된 3형 조건문. 'If I had known'의 격식체 대안.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: Had I known earlier, I would have changed my career.

explanation.en: 'If it hadn't been for + noun' = 'but for + noun' — hypothetical past.
explanation.ko: 'if it hadn't been for + 명사' = 'but for + 명사' — 과거 가정.

questions.prompt: If it _____ for the government's investment, the project would have collapsed. (~이 없었더라면 정부 투자가 없었더라면 프로젝트가 무너졌을 것입니다.)

explanation.en: Correct: 'If + past perfect, would have + past participle'.
explanation.ko: 올바른 형태: 'If + 과거완료, would have + 과거분사'.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 올바른 3형 조건문은?
choices: If she had called, I will have answered.
If she had called, I would answer.
If she had called, I would have answered.
If she called, I would have answered.

explanation.en: Mixed conditional: past choices → present life situation. 'Would be living' (present continuous).
explanation.ko: 혼합 조건문: 과거 선택 → 현재 생활 상황. 'would be living'(현재 진행).

questions.prompt: She _____ a better life now if she had made different choices years ago. (몇 년 전에 다른 선택을 했더라면 지금 더 나은 삶을 살고 있을 텐데.)

explanation.en: In formal English, 'if' can be omitted by inverting subject and auxiliary: 'Were it not for...'.
explanation.ko: 격식 영어에서 주어와 조동사를 도치하여 'if'를 생략할 수 있습니다: 'Were it not for...'

questions.prompt: 'Were it not for modern medicine, many people would have died from these diseases.' — 이 문장에서 도치가 일어난 이유는?

explanation.en: 'Might have succeeded had they planned better' = inverted third conditional with 'might have'.
explanation.ko: 'might have succeeded had they planned better' = 'might have'를 사용한 도치 3형 조건문.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: They might have succeeded had they planned better.

explanation.en: 'If only + past perfect' expresses regret about a past action.
explanation.ko: 'if only + 과거완료'는 과거 행동에 대한 후회를 표현합니다.

questions.prompt: If only I _____ my passport at home — I had to miss the flight! (여권을 집에 두고 오지 않았더라면 — 비행기를 놓칠 수밖에 없었어요!)

explanation.en: 'Wish + past perfect' expresses the same meaning as a third conditional.
explanation.ko: 'wish + 과거완료'는 3형 조건문과 같은 의미를 표현합니다.

questions.prompt: 'I wish I had taken that job offer.' — 이 문장과 같은 의미의 조건문은?
choices: If I take the job, I will be happy.
If I had taken that job, things would be different now.
If I took that job, I would be happy.
If I take the job, things would change.

explanation.en: Mixed: past choice ('had studied') → present state ('would be a doctor now').
explanation.ko: 혼합: 과거 선택('had studied') → 현재 상태('would be a doctor now').

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: Do you regret not studying medicine? B: A little. If I _____ medicine, I _____ a doctor now.'
